mnemonics: All Hungry CPUs Must Eat (ALU, Control Unit, Memory Unit, Execution Unit)
keyPoints: The ALU performs arithmetic and logical operations.
The Control Unit directs the operation of the processor by interpreting instructions.
Registers provide fast access storage for data the CPU is currently processing.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Memory Unit (RAM) with secondary storage (HDD/SSD).
Thinking the Control Unit performs calculations (it only directs traffic).
